equipped_weapon.name: Dragonslayer's Oath
equipped_weapon.description: A greatsword said to have ended an age. Absurdly rare to find.

equipped_armor.name: Dragonscale Aegis
equipped_armor.description: Overlapping scales said to have turned aside a dragon's breath.

equipped_rings.name: Sovereign's Signet
equipped_rings.description: The seal of a throne of ash. It still expects obedience.

equipped_rings.name: Band of the Barrow
equipped_rings.description: Buried alongside the Knight himself. It has not gone cold.

equipped_weapon.name: Knightsbane
equipped_weapon.description: Forged in the barrow's cold fire; still hums with the Knight's fury.

equipped_armor.name: Sentinel's Bulwark
equipped_armor.description: Stone-set plate that stood watch longer than its wearer lived.

equipped_rings.name: Sentinel's Seal
equipped_rings.description: The badge of the barrow watch, heavy as duty.

equipped_rings.name: Mimic's Coil
equipped_rings.description: Still faintly shifting, as if unsure what shape to hold.

equipped_weapon.name: Warden's Fang
equipped_weapon.description: Torn from the Warden's own jaw; the scales along its edge still shed.

equipped_armor.name: Barrow-Touched Plate
equipped_armor.description: Unearthed from the barrow's outer vaults, still faintly humming.

equipped_rings.name: Ring of Favor
equipped_rings.description: A goddess's favor, or a very good forgery of it.

equipped_rings.name: Wolfsbane Signet
equipped_rings.description: Carved with a snarling wolf's-head, still sharp-edged.

equipped_weapon.name: Sovereign's Reckoning
equipped_weapon.description: What's left of a throne, reforged into something that only takes.

equipped_armor.name: Elite Knight's Armor
equipped_armor.description: Proud plate that outlived its order and its knight.

equipped_rings.name: Ring of Vigor
equipped_rings.description: Pried from a goblin's clenched, still-twitching fist.

equipped_rings.name: Ring of Warding
equipped_rings.description: Threaded with a ward-sigil, dulled but still active.

items.name: Potion
items.description: A murky red draught that knits shallow wounds shut.

items.name: Ether
items.description: Bitter and metallic; steadies the mind enough to cast again.

items.name: Greater Potion
items.description: Thicker and richer than a common potion — it mends deep.

items.name: Greater Ether
items.description: A potent tonic that floods the mind with restored focus.

items.name: Sovereign Elixir
items.description: A regal cure-all, brewed for a king who never earned it.

items.name: Ember of Return
items.description: A single coal that refuses to go out. It remembers being alive.

items.name: Purging Stone
items.description: Smooth and cold; it drinks in whatever curse clings to you.

weapons.name: Worn Shortsword
weapons.description: A nicked, well-used blade. Better than fists.

weapons.name: Apprentice's Wand
weapons.description: A simple wand every mage starts with.

weapons.name: Acolyte's Mace
weapons.description: Blunt and humble, blessed only lightly.

weapons.name: Thief's Dirk
weapons.description: Slim, quick, and honest about none of its history.

weapons.name: Iron Sword
weapons.description: A sturdy, mass-produced blade left behind by a traveler.

weapons.name: Goblin Shiv
weapons.description: Crude but wickedly sharp.

weapons.name: Hollow Soldier's Blade
weapons.description: Its owner forgot everything but how to swing it.

weapons.name: Traveler's Spear
weapons.description: Light, well-balanced, and easy to keep an enemy at range.

weapons.name: Bone Blade
weapons.description: Carved from a fallen skeleton's own femur.

weapons.name: Bandit's Falchion
weapons.description: Curved for cutting purses and throats alike.

weapons.name: Sunlit Straightsword
weapons.description: Kept bright by an oath someone else abandoned.

weapons.name: Orcish Greataxe
weapons.description: Heavy enough to fell a tree in one swing.

weapons.name: Wraithbane Edge
weapons.description: Etched with wards that flare hot near the restless dead.

weapons.name: Sunken Relic Blade
weapons.description: Pulled from somewhere it should never have been found.

weapons.name: Fell Censer
weapons.description: Swings heavy; the smoke it sheds still prays.

weapons.name: Forsaken Longsword
weapons.description: Its crest was filed off long before its wielder fell.

weapons.name: Sentinel's Greathammer
weapons.description: A pillar with a grip. The barrow shook when it fell.

weapons.name: Moonlit Greatsword
weapons.description: A pale arc of light given an edge. It hums when drawn.

weapons.name: Mimic's Fang
weapons.description: Still faintly warm. It was a tooth a moment ago.

weapons.name: Dragonslayer's Oath
weapons.description: A greatsword said to have ended an age. Absurdly rare to find.

weapons.name: Knightsbane
weapons.description: Forged in the barrow's cold fire; still hums with the Knight's fury.

weapons.name: Warden's Fang
weapons.description: Torn from the Warden's own jaw; the scales along its edge still shed.

weapons.name: Sovereign's Reckoning
weapons.description: What's left of a throne, reforged into something that only takes.

weapons.name: Dragonslayer's Oath
weapons.description: A greatsword said to have ended an age. Absurdly rare to find.

weapons.name: Knightsbane
weapons.description: Forged in the barrow's cold fire; still hums with the Knight's fury.

weapons.name: Warden's Fang
weapons.description: Torn from the Warden's own jaw; the scales along its edge still shed.

weapons.name: Sovereign's Reckoning
weapons.description: What's left of a throne, reforged into something that only takes.

armors.name: Padded Vest
armors.description: Quilted cloth over leather. Better than bare skin.

armors.name: Worn Leather Jerkin
armors.description: Cracked with age, but the stitching still holds.

armors.name: Traveler's Chestguard
armors.description: Boiled leather plates, favored by wandering merchants.

armors.name: Ranger's Cloak
armors.description: Woven to shed rain, blades, and notice alike.

armors.name: Chainmail Hauberk
armors.description: Interlocked rings stripped from a fallen skeleton.

armors.name: Acolyte's Vestment
armors.description: Ash-gray robes, hemmed with prayers best left unread.

armors.name: Brigand Leathers
armors.description: Patched a dozen times, each patch a bad story.

armors.name: Warded Chainmail
armors.description: Cold to the touch, etched with wards against the restless dead.

armors.name: Knight's Plate
armors.description: Dented but unbroken, stripped from a brute of an orc.

armors.name: Elite Knight's Armor
armors.description: Proud plate that outlived its order and its knight.

armors.name: Sentinel's Bulwark
armors.description: Stone-set plate that stood watch longer than its wearer lived.

armors.name: Barrow-Touched Plate
armors.description: Unearthed from the barrow's outer vaults, still faintly humming.

armors.name: Dragonscale Aegis
armors.description: Overlapping scales said to have turned aside a dragon's breath.

rings.name: Copper Band
rings.description: A plain band, faintly warm to the touch.

rings.name: Traveler's Ring
rings.description: Worn smooth by a hundred roads.

rings.name: Ring of Vigor
rings.description: Pried from a goblin's clenched, still-twitching fist.

rings.name: Ring of Warding
rings.description: Threaded with a ward-sigil, dulled but still active.

rings.name: Ghoul's Knucklebone
rings.description: A finger bone lashed into a crude loop. Still hungry.

rings.name: Wolfsbane Signet
rings.description: Carved with a snarling wolf's-head, still sharp-edged.

rings.name: Warded Loop
rings.description: A closed circuit of old wards, humming under strain.

rings.name: Ring of Favor
rings.description: A goddess's favor, or a very good forgery of it.

rings.name: Sentinel's Seal
rings.description: The badge of the barrow watch, heavy as duty.

rings.name: Mimic's Coil
rings.description: Still faintly shifting, as if unsure what shape to hold.

rings.name: Sovereign's Signet
rings.description: The seal of a throne of ash. It still expects obedience.

rings.name: Band of the Barrow
rings.description: Buried alongside the Knight himself. It has not gone cold.
